title: CurriculumBundle v0.1
description: Output artifact of a Workbench Supervisor run. Wraps every produced SkillBundle (by content_hash + manifestation cell) with per-skill invariant claims, coverage metrics (Wilson lower bound), and budget accounting. Hash-compatible with SkillBundle: canonicalize, exclude content_hash + signature, sha256.

invariant_claims.description: Per-skill, per-gate evidence. v0.2 expands this to record ALL gates run on each skill (not just the charter's named invariant gate). Each skill therefore contributes 6+ entries (6 v0.1 gates + any MCP gates that fired).

gate.description: v0.2 vocabulary: gate.content_hash | gate.trace_completeness | gate.no_hidden_capability | gate.authority | gate.redaction_verify | gate.replay_fidelity | gate.tool_contract_compliance | gate.tool_idempotence | gate.tool_version_consistency

evidence_ref.description: JSON pointer into the referenced SkillBundle's proof.gates[]. Pointer only — no inlined payload (keeps the curriculum citable + small).

critic_dissent.description: v0.1 + v0.2: true iff the devil's advocate dissented on this skill+gate. Advisory only — does NOT flip `passed`.

counter_example.description: v0.2: optional. When the advocate dissented, this is the counter-example it produced (args/cell coordinates that would have exposed the cheap-pass). Drives future gate revisions.

panel_verdict.description: v0.2: optional structured record of the 3-agent panel's verdicts for this skill+gate.

lead.description: Lead teacher status (produced the skill / errored mid-teach).

advocate.description: Devil's advocate verdict. 'skipped' when advocate slot was unstaffed for this skill.

cells_covered.description: Distinct cells (dedup'd by canonical key) with ≥1 examiner-pass for the charter's invariant. NOT a count of passing skills.

wilson_lower_bound.description: 95% Wilson lower bound on cells_covered / cells_total. Hand-verifiable from JSON alone.

intentionally_excluded.description: v0.2: cells the charter explicitly excluded via `manifestation_excludes`. Surfaced separately to keep the report honest about not-covered vs frontier-remaining.

mcp_targets_resolved.description: v0.2: when charter.mcp_targets[] was set, this records the RESOLVED state at run-time — server_version actually discovered + server_fingerprint computed from tools/list. Re-verifiers compare this against the live server to detect drift.

panel_summary.description: v0.2: aggregate of panel verdicts across all skills. Useful for at-a-glance health on the /supervise inspector.

advocate_dissent.description: Number of skills where the advocate dissented despite examiner pass. High dissent ⇒ gate may be too weak.

advocate_dissent_examples.description: v0.2: up to 5 counter-examples surfaced for human review.
